34],[343,534,1776530993246],[339,539,1776530993260],[337,541,1776530993274],[338,541,1776530993290],[339,541,1776530993304],[340,541,1776530993318],[341,541,1776530993334],[342,541,1776530993343],[343,541,1776530993352],[344,541,1776530993363],[345,541,1776530993375],[346,542,1776530993403],[347,544,1776530993411],[349,545,1776530993422],[350,546,1776530993436],[351,548,1776530993444],[353,548,1776530993452],[353,549,1776530993459],[354,550,1776530993472],[355,550,1776530993482],[357,551,1776530993494],[358,553,1776530993508],[360,554,1776530993518],[361,554,1776530993528],[362,555,1776530993541],[363,556,1776530993553],[365,557,1776530993572],[366,557,1776530993594],[367,558,1776530993601],[368,559,1776530993605],[369,559,1776530993620],[370,559,1776530993630],[371,560,1776530993636],[370,560,1776530993645],[369,560,1776530993659]],"mm-mp":17.35299901671583,"md":[[346,541,1776530993391]],"md-mp":3954.5,"mu":[[346,541,1776530993563]],"mu-mp":3979.75},"v":1,"tc":{}}
